languages.text: "Ваша информация неверна, капитан. Фамильная стезя Гапраков — служба в рядах Имперского Флота".
"Your information is incorrect, Captain. The Gaprak family tradition is to serve in the ranks of the Imperial Navy."
languages.original_text: "Ваша информация неверна, капитан. Фамильная стезя Гапраков — служба в рядах Имперского Флота".

traits.locale_text: "Your information is incorrect, Captain. The Gaprak family tradition is to serve in the ranks of the Imperial Navy."

languages.text: «Su información no es correcta, capitán. La tradición familiar de los Gaprak es servir en las filas de la Armada Imperial».
languages.original_text: "Your information is incorrect, Captain. The Gaprak family tradition is to serve in the ranks of the Imperial Navy."

traits.locale_text: «Su información no es correcta, capitán. La tradición familiar de los Gaprak es servir en las filas de la Armada Imperial».

languages.text: “你的信息不准，上尉。贾帕克家族的传统是在帝国海军队伍服役。”
languages.original_text: "Your information is incorrect, Captain. The Gaprak family tradition is to serve in the ranks of the Imperial Navy."

traits.locale_text: “你的信息不准，上尉。贾帕克家族的传统是在帝国海军队伍服役。”

languages.text: « Vous êtes mal renseigné, capitaine. La tradition familiale veut que les Gaprak servent dans les rangs de la Marine Impériale. »
languages.original_text: "Your information is incorrect, Captain. The Gaprak family tradition is to serve in the ranks of the Imperial Navy."

traits.locale_text: « Vous êtes mal renseigné, capitaine. La tradition familiale veut que les Gaprak servent dans les rangs de la Marine Impériale. »

languages.text: "Bilginiz yanlış Yüzbaşı. Gaprak ailesinin geleneği, İmparatorluk Donanması saflarında hizmet etmektir."
languages.original_text: "Your information is incorrect, Captain. The Gaprak family tradition is to serve in the ranks of the Imperial Navy."

traits.locale_text: "Bilginiz yanlış Yüzbaşı. Gaprak ailesinin geleneği, İmparatorluk Donanması saflarında hizmet etmektir."

languages.text: "Eure Informationen sind falsch, Captain. Die Gaprak dienen traditionell in der Imperialen Kriegsflotte."
languages.original_text: "Your information is incorrect, Captain. The Gaprak family tradition is to serve in the ranks of the Imperial Navy."

traits.locale_text: "Eure Informationen sind falsch, Captain. Die Gaprak dienen traditionell in der Imperialen Kriegsflotte."

languages.text: 「お情報はおかしいですね、艦長。ギャプラク家の伝統は帝国海軍の兵士として仕えることです。」
languages.original_text: "Your information is incorrect, Captain. The Gaprak family tradition is to serve in the ranks of the Imperial Navy."

traits.locale_text: 「お情報はおかしいですね、艦長。ギャプラク家の伝統は帝国海軍の兵士として仕えることです。」
